text:
よーし、リラックスしすぎない程度に
リラックスして頑張ろー！

肩肘張ったままじゃ、本領発揮も
ままならないはずだもんね。

いつだって大事なのは
呼吸を合わせる強い心！
って、レギアスが言ってたよ。

ま、難しく考えないで
がんばってみよっか！

Okay, let's just relax and get to it. I mean,
don't relax too much, of course!

But we won't be at our best if we're all
worried about how we should act around each
other, right? So...relax!

Regius told me once that the most important
thing in battle is to have the mental fortitude
to stay focused and control your breath.

So let's just put those worries aside and get
started, shall we?
